product_overview: QConnect is a cafe/shop management frontend that supports owner onboarding, QR-based customer ordering, order handling, and basic shop management. This PRD focuses on the main user journeys available in the app: registering a shop, browsing the customer menu, placing orders, and managing kitchen orders.
core_goals: Create a new shop account and complete initial shop setup
Let customers open a QR-based menu, browse items, and place orders
Allow customers to call a waiter from the menu
Enable kitchen staff to view active orders and update order status

features.name: Shop Registration
features.description: Allows an owner to create a new shop account and set up the shop profile.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in shop name -> Fill in owner name -> Fill in mobile and address -> Select a logo image file -> Submit the shop creation form -> See the shop setup complete state

features.name: Customer Menu Viewing
features.description: Lets customers open a QR-based menu, browse categories and items, search the menu, and request waiter assistance.
user_flows: Scan a table QR code to open /menu/:shopId -> View the shop menu and item categories -> Select a category to filter items -> Search for an item using the search bar -> Call a waiter for service -> See the service request confirmation
Scan a table QR code to open /menu/:shopId -> View the shop menu and item categories -> Search for an item using the search bar -> Browse the matching menu items

features.name: Order Placement
features.description: Allows customers to add menu items to a cart, add notes, and place an order.
user_flows: Scan a table QR code to open /menu/:shopId -> View the menu items -> Add items to the cart -> Open the cart -> Add special notes -> Place the order -> See the order confirmation
Scan a table QR code to open /menu/:shopId -> Add one or more items to the cart -> Open the cart -> Remove or review items before checkout -> Place the order -> See the order confirmation

features.name: Kitchen Order Control
features.description: Gives kitchen staff a view of active orders and lets them update each order through the preparation stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /orders -> View the list of active orders -> Select an order -> Mark the order as accepted -> Mark the order as preparing -> Mark the order as ready -> See the updated order status
Navigate to /orders -> View the list of active orders -> Select an order -> Mark the order as preparing -> See the status update reflected on the order card

routes.description: Shop statistics and feedback summary dashboard
Menu builder to add categories and items
QR code generation and table management
Active order management with status updates
Order billing history and print invoice page
Shop settings, language settings, and delete account
Customer ordering menu based on QR code scan

features.name: Customer Menu Viewing
user_interactions: Scan table QR code to open menu page
Select a menu category tab to filter items
Click Call Waiter button to call for service

features.name: Order Placement
features.description: Add items to cart and check out
user_interactions: Click Add on menu items to add to cart
Click Cart button to view items in cart
Add special notes in text area

features.name: Kitchen Order Control
user_interactions: Click Accept or Preparing or Ready on an order card
